name: TriviaAPI_get_questions
description: Get trivia questions from The Trivia API (the-trivia-api.com). Returns questions with correct answers, incorrect answer options, difficulty level, and category tags. No authentication required. Covers science, history, geography, sports, music, films, art, general knowledge, and more. Useful for building quiz games, educational apps, and testing knowledge.

categories.description: Comma-separated categories. Values: 'science', 'history', 'geography', 'sport_and_leisure', 'music', 'film_and_tv', 'arts_and_literature', 'general_knowledge', 'society_and_culture', 'food_and_drink'. Default: all categories

difficulty.description: Question difficulty. Values: 'easy', 'medium', 'hard'. Default: all difficulties

limit.description: Number of questions to return (1-50). Default: 5

types.description: Question type. Values: 'text_choice' (multiple choice). Default: text_choice
